# Content Spotlight Landscape

The Content Spotlight Landscape component displays content with a landscape-oriented image (3:2 aspect ratio), providing a wider visual format ideal for scenic photography, group photos, or content that benefits from horizontal composition. It supports flexible positioning, alignment options, and theme customization.

## Interactive Preview

Use the controls panel below to experiment with the content spotlight landscape's properties in real-time.

<Controls of={ContentSpotlightLandscapeStories.ContentSpotlightLandscape} />

## Usage Guidelines

### When to Use

- Featuring landscape-oriented imagery or scenic photography
- Displaying content that benefits from horizontal composition
- Creating balanced layouts with wider visual elements
- Showcasing group photos or wide-angle content

### Image Considerations

- Use landscape-oriented images (wider than tall)
- Recommended aspect ratio: 3:2
- Ensure images are high quality and properly cropped
- Consider the focal point when choosing image position

## Visual Regression Testing

For comprehensive testing of all theme variations and configurations, see the [Visreg page](?path=/story/molecules-content-spotlight-content-spotlight-landscape-visreg--visreg).
